name: codex-notepad-librarian
description: A Windows-first Codex plugin that turns a folder of plain .txt notes into an organized, searchable personal library.

interface.shortDescription: Organize plain .txt notes written in Windows Notepad.
interface.longDescription: A Windows-first Codex plugin that helps users write naturally in Notepad while Codex organizes saved .txt files into a searchable local text library with indexes, recent context, preserved originals, and cited retrieval.
defaultPrompt: Find what I wrote about this topic.
Save this conversation to my Notepad library.
